docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KATE MAEDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KM2 WINES, LLC DBA SCARLET FOX

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KM2 WINES, LLC DBA SCARLET FOX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MELANIE GETMAN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KM2 WINES, LLC DBA SCARLET FOX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GETMAN, MELANIE $3,720.00 PRINCIPAL, $210.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,930.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,720.00 FILED BY KM2 WINES, LLC DBA SCARLET FOX AS TO DEFENDANT GETMAN, MELANIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KM2 WINES, LLC DBA SCARLET FOX
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-05-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $160.00 SERVED APR-21-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GETMAN, MELANIE
